description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the default node:8.10 image and additional images/services as defined, with stages prepare, test, build-backend, deploy-backend, provision-backend, build-frontend, deploy-frontend, and confidence-check. Add prepare jobs (prepare, prepare_accounts, prepare_frontend, prepare_periodicals, prepare_server) that abort on WIP commits, run yarn install (or cd into sub‑dirs and yarn install) with frozen lockfiles and cache node_modules as artifacts for one month. Add build jobs (build_accounts, build_frontend, build_periodicals, build_server) that cd into each stack and execute yarn run build, storing the resulting dist directories (and package files for frontend) as one‑month artifacts, plus a dummy build_terraform job preserving Terraform files; include a dast job using owasp/zap2docker-weekly to set SITE_URL based on branch, run /zap/zap-baseline.py and save gl-dast-report.json. Add e2e:chrome and e2e:firefox jobs using selenium/standalone‑chrome:3.13 and selenium/standalone‑firefox:3.13 services, respectively, that set MAINTENANCE_MODE when needed, run yarn run confidence-check with the appropriate host, retry twice, and keep __e2e__ results artifacts; also include license_management (docker:stable image, runs GitLab license‑management container, allows failure, stores gl-license-management-report.json), performance (docker:git image, downloads sitespeed‑io, runs against SITE_URL, stores performance.json), and sast (registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gl-sast image, runs /app/bin/run .). Add deploy_frontend (except master) and deploy_frontend_prod (only master) jobs that cd into stacks/frontend, set AWS credentials for production, run yarn run deploy and awaitDeployTasks, creating review environments; add deploy_terraform using hashicorp/terraform:0.11.2 to export TF_VARs from CI variables, init, plan, apply, output Heroku URLs, package server artifacts, git push to Heroku, and publish as review_api environment; finally include provision_databases (alpine:3.6) to install curl, jq, postgresql-client, fetch Heroku DATABASE_URL via API, configure .pgpass, and run stacks/provision_databases.sh, plus manual stop_frontend and stop_terraform jobs to stop the review environments, all with the specified artifacts, dependencies, caches, and only/except rules.
